decks.notes: The deck is focused on controlling the opponent's actions and resources through a combination of hand disruption, removal spells, and powerful creatures like Sheoldred, the Apocalypse. It aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan while gradually gaining advantage and eventually overwhelming them with card advantage and potent threats. The deck also utilizes lands like Mutavault and utility lands like Boseiju, Who Endures to further enhance its control elements and provide additional value. By efficiently managing resources and disrupting the opponent, the deck can outlast and outplay its opponents in a one-on-one matchup.

The deck focuses on aggressively using cheap spells to trigger the casting of Arclight Phoenix from the graveyard, while also utilizing card draw and manipulation to maintain a steady flow of spells. The inclusion of cards like Ledger Shredder and Picklock Prankster helps enable the graveyard shenanigans, while also providing additional utility. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of cheap burn spells, efficient creatures, and the recurring threat of Arclight Phoenix. The land base is optimized for consistent mana production to facilitate casting multiple spells per turn.

The deck focuses on assembling the combo of Greasefang and Parhelion II to generate value and overwhelm the opponent. It includes key cards such as Fleeting Spirit, Iron-Shield Elf, and Monument to Endurance to support the combo pieces. The deck also includes disruption cards like Thoughtseize and Fatal Push to control the opponent's board state. The mana base is designed to provide the necessary colors for the combo pieces while also including utility lands like Godless Shrine and Geier Reach Sanitarium. Overall, the deck aims to create a powerful synergy between its cards to achieve victory.

This deck focuses on utilizing control elements to disrupt the opponent's strategy while gradually building up resources and card advantage. The key strategy involves using removal spells like Fatal Push and Abrupt Decay to deal with threats, alongside hand disruption spells like Thoughtseize and Duress. The deck also features powerful creatures like Sentinel of the Nameless City and Sheoldred, the Apocalypse to apply pressure and close out the game. The mana base is designed to support both the control and creature aspects of the deck, providing consistency and flexibility in various situations.

This deck focuses on creating a powerful combo using Greasefang and Parhelion II to create a synergistic win condition. The main strategy involves controlling the board with removal spells like Fatal Push and Thoughtseize, while also protecting key pieces with cards like Iron-Shield Elf and Monument to Endurance. The deck also utilizes lands that provide additional utility, such as Geier Reach Sanitarium and Bleachbone Verge. Overall, the deck aims to quickly assemble its combo pieces and overwhelm the opponent with a versatile and powerful strategy.

The main focus of this deck is to assemble a fast and aggressive board presence, using low-cost creatures like Monastery Swiftspear and Emberheart Challenger to deal damage quickly. The deck also includes burn spells like Burst Lightning and Reckless Rage to remove opposing threats and push through damage. Den of the Bugbear and Ramunap Ruins provide additional reach in the late game, while cards like Robber of the Rich and Soul-Scar Mage offer versatile options for disrupting opponents. Overall, this deck aims to overwhelm opponents with a relentless onslaught of damage.

This deck focuses on aggression with a combination of efficient creatures like Aven Interrupter and Skyclave Apparition, supported by mana acceleration from Elvish Mystic and Llanowar Elves. Thalia, Guardian of Thraben disrupts opponents' spells, while Collected Company helps bring out multiple threats at once. The deck also includes some protection with cards like Enduring Innocence and Ouroboroid. With a mix of different creatures and spells, this Selesnya Aggro deck aims to overwhelm opponents with fast, versatile threats while maintaining board control.

The deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's strategy by using a combination of removal spells and hand disruption. It aims to control the game through a mix of efficient removal spells like Fatal Push and Maelstrom Pulse, along with disruptive cards like Thoughtseize and Duress. The mana base is designed to support the deck's powerful creatures like Sheoldred, the Apocalypse, and Emeritus of Abundance. With a focus on resource denial and controlling the tempo of the game, this deck aims to outvalue and outlast the opponent in a grindy match-up.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly establish a board presence with efficient creatures like Badgermole Cub and Ouroboroid, supported by mana acceleration from Llanowar Elves and Elvish Mystic. Collected Company allows for explosive plays by putting additional threats onto the battlefield. Thalia, Heretic Cathar and Thalia, Guardian of Thraben disrupt the opponent's game plan, while Skyclave Apparition provides removal for problematic threats. Elspeth, Storm Slayer serves as a finisher, creating an army of tokens. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive strategy in Pioneer 1 vs 1 format.

The deck focuses on utilizing Yorion, Sky Nomad as a companion to maximize value through blinking permanents. The main strategy revolves around controlling the game with counterspells like Dovin's Veto and removal spells like Erode, while also generating card advantage with Teferi, Hero of Dominaria and Memory Deluge. The deck aims to outvalue the opponent by playing a long game and ultimately winning with powerful finishers like The Wandering Emperor and Hall of Storm Giants. The inclusion of Consult the Star Charts and No More Lies helps to filter through the deck and find key cards for each situation.

This Selesnya Aggro deck focuses on utilizing efficient creatures and disruption spells to quickly overwhelm opponents. By playing low-cost creatures like Llanowar Elves and Elvish Mystic, along with powerful cards like Archon of Emeria and Skyclave Apparition, the deck aims to apply constant pressure and disrupt opponent's strategies. Cards like Thalia, Guardian of Thraben and Enduring Innocence help to slow down opponents, while Collected Company provides additional creature cards for surprise attacks. With a mix of aggression and disruption, this deck aims to outpace opponents and secure victory through consistent pressure.

The deck focuses on controlling the game by countering opponent's spells, removing threats from the board, and drawing cards to maintain card advantage. It utilizes a mix of removal spells, counterspells, and card draw to disrupt the opponent's game plan while setting up its own win conditions. The deck also includes a variety of lands to ensure mana consistency and utility. Key cards like Teferi, Hero of Dominaria and Supreme Verdict can help stabilize the board and generate card advantage, leading to a gradual victory through attrition and control.

This deck focuses on combining the abilities of Greasefang, Okiba Boss and Parhelion II to create a powerful synergy that overwhelms the opponent. By using cards like Bitter Triumph, Cache Grab, and Formidable Speaker, the deck aims to control the board and set up for the combo finish. Support cards like Overlord of the Balemurk and Thundering Broodwagon provide additional utility and threats. With a mix of removal, card draw, and powerful creatures, this deck aims to outpace and outvalue the opponent to secure victory.

The deck focuses on using various combo pieces to reanimate powerful creatures and disrupt the opponent's game plan. It includes cards like Watery Grave, Thoughtseize, and Fatal Push to control the board and protect your combo pieces. Superior Spider-Man and Emeritus of Ideation are key reanimation targets, while cards like Stock Up and Insatiable Avarice help draw through the deck and find your combo pieces quickly. The goal is to quickly assemble the necessary pieces to overwhelm the opponent with powerful creatures and combos.

This deck focuses on quickly filling the graveyard with spells to bring back Arclight Phoenix, using efficient removal and draw spells to maintain tempo and aggression. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with a flurry of spells and creatures, utilizing the powerful synergy between Arclight Phoenix and cheap spells. The deck aims to close out games quickly by utilizing the Phoenix's ability to return from the graveyard and deal damage to the opponent, while also disrupting the opponent's game plan with removal and disruptive spells.

The focus of this Aggro Red Deck Wins archetype is to deal fast and consistent damage to the opponent using efficient creatures, burn spells, and direct damage effects. By aggressively attacking with creatures like Monastery Swiftspear, Emberheart Challenger, and Robber of the Rich, and supplementing them with burn spells like Burst Lightning and Reckless Rage, the deck aims to quickly reduce the opponent's life total to zero. The inclusion of cards like Monstrous Rage and Screaming Nemesis provides additional damage output and pressure, making it a potent and speedy deck in Pioneer 1 vs 1 matches.
